pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"GitHub RAW 镜像仅为其他镜像服务。"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"rosdep-init","children":"rosdep init"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["主内容在 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../rosdistro/","children":"ROS Distro 帮助"}]," 中。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"stackage-global-hints-cacheyaml","children":"stackage global-hints-cache.yaml"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["主内容在 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../stackage/","children":"Stackage 帮助"}]," 中。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"手动下载"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["到 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.stack/pantry/global-hints-cache.yaml"}],"（在 Windows 下是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"%APPDATA%\stack\pantry\global-hints-cache.yaml"}],"）。注意文件名不同。这是由于 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"stack"}]," 暂时不支持配置该文件的上游地址。该文件需要在每当第一次用到新版本的 GHC 时更新。"]}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# 手动模拟 rosdep init");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("mkdir -p /etc/ros/rosdep/sources.list.d/");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("curl -o /etc/ros/rosdep/sources.list.d/20-default.list -L ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/ros/rosdistro/master/rosdep/sources.list.d/20-default.list");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
